meaning: n.贸易商,商人,干非法勾当者,行为卑劣者
examples: Police said they believed the attack was in retaliation for the death of the drug trafficker.
But police arrested Rodolfo lopez, who they said is an important trafficker.
If a drug trafficker is going to shoot me, I won't hesitate in shooting him first.
The U.S. Treasury Department has declared Guzman the most influential trafficker in the world.
In many cases, newspapers are the first to hear when a body is left by a trafficker.
